name: e-commerce-storefront
description: A robust e-commerce platform featuring product listings, user accounts, a shopping cart, order management, and an admin panel for product inventory. This storefront integrates with a Python-based inventory synchronization service, and leverages other internal microservices like the AI-Powered Content Summarizer for generating product descriptions and the Markdown Previewer for rich text content management in the admin panel. Future integrations may include the Full-Stack Blog Platform for marketing content.

scripts.test: echo "No tests specified for the root project. Run tests in client/ or server/ as needed." && exit 0

author: Your Name/Organization
